title: Jonas Tech, Exploration and Building Pack
description:
Explore, Build, Advance 
- 
The Modpack blends Create’s ingenious mechanical building systems with advanced automation from Tech Reborn and its add-ons, set against vast new realms courtesy of Botanica, The Aether, Ad Astra and more.
body:
Welcome to the Jonas Tech, Exploration and Building Pack — a symphony of complex machinery, boundless exploration, and architectural freedom.

Dive deep into automation and engineering with Create, where gears, conveyor belts, and kinetic energy power your industrial revolution. Erect sprawling factories, design ingenious mechanical systems, and push efficiency even further with Tech Reborn and its add-ons, mastering intricate production chains and transforming your base into a technological marvel.

But the factory floors are just the beginning! Traverse breathtaking worlds shaped by Biomes O’ Plenty; with Distant Horizons, these vistas stretch to the farthest skyline. Then take to the skies in The Aether, or blast off with Ad Astra to explore alien planets and build your home among the stars.

This pack fuses the thrill of technological advancement with the joy of discovery and the art of grand construction. Whether you’re an ingenious inventor, an intrepid explorer, or a visionary master builder, you’ll find the tools and the worlds for your next great Minecraft adventure. Explore, build, automate!
